metadata.description: Battle-tested agentic engineering plugins for .NET, Orleans, and Uno Platform

plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: Skills for .NET development including charting with LiveCharts2 and a modern C# 14 editorconfig baseline

plugins.name: orleans
plugins.description: Skills for Microsoft Orleans 10 development including the result pattern and the multiservice modular-monolith pattern

plugins.name: uno-platform
plugins.description: Skills for Uno Platform cross-platform development including Fluent design, navigation, responsive layouts, C# Markup 2 (CSharpForMarkup), and testing
